# AURORA changelog

_Generated 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z by the LUCA-flow deployer._

This first release of the **AURORA** site composes the work of every contributor in order. The following items shipped:

- 🎨 Built the AURORA design system and hero page
- 🖼️ Completed the NASA aurora gallery
- 🔭 Rebuilt the science explainer using a different framing
- 🔧 Wrote the AURORA spec sheet
- ✨ Wrote the mission, about, and preorder pages
